final_prompt.prompt:
Create a 9:16 vertical screenshot of a Douyin livestream featuring a female host.

Style/medium: needs a livestream UI aesthetic — references in the spirit of Douyin/TikTok interface design language, 2010s Chinese mobile app UI conventions, Kuaishou livestream overlay traditions; exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be 9:16 vertical format suitable for mobile phone screen capture
Subject: must include a female host (神仙姐姐) holding a sign as the focal subject
Scene/backdrop: must include Douyin livestream interface elements (comments, likes, viewer count, gift buttons typical of Chinese livestreaming platforms)
Lighting/mood: needs a warm, engaging livestream atmosphere — exact lighting setup is yours
Color palette: 
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): must include "今晚直播，欢迎来参亦菲畅聊！" on the sign the host is holding
Constraints: must be 9:16 aspect ratio, must preserve all Chinese characters exactly as written
Avoid:
